title: Spongebob Footstep Sounds
description: With this pack, you'll finally be able to go steppin' on the beach do-do-do-DO. Replaces player footstep sounds with Spongebob walking sounds.
body: This pack is a definite meme. It contains the painstaking process of telling the game to use two different sounds for every block in the game. In short, every step you take will sound like Spongebob walking somewhere.
